name: The Harbor Holdout
description: The survivors who never left Rivermouth — they keep the marina gates shut, share what the tide brings in, and take the measure of anyone who comes down the waterfront asking for a berth.
notes: T53 · Rivermouth. A wary-but-decent holdout; sarah (healer) + marcus (ex-cop) recruit as allies (co-membership seeds a friendly bond), so taking both in lifts shelter morale (FR-NPC-07).
